notes: The game runs perfeclty even on this very low end hardware, I encountered a freeze once but it lasted about 30 seconds and then the game continued like if nothing have happened, it may have just been my pc but other than that you can play the game perfectly.
title: Pocket Rogues

notes: The game is still in early access. It does not launch, just appears a window with a fast loading, then the game crashes. I've tested with proton 4.2-7 and 3.16, both had the same result. The game runs well if open the file "Pocket Rogues.exe" with Wine (I've tested with 4.0.1 version). It also runs in Windows wine steam client in Lutris. Using wine I had two problems: 1) the game freezes if you minimize the window; 2) the sound has some problems.
title: Pocket Rogues

notes: The game runs perfectly out of the box. When I used proton in 4.2-7 version, the game did not launch, after update to 4.2-9 it runs flawlessly.
title: Pocket Rogues
